nasb.text: one cherub at the one end and one cherub at the other end; he made the cherubim of one piece with the mercy seat at the two ends.

esv.text: one cherub on the one end, and one cherub on the other end. Of one piece with the mercy seat he made the cherubim on its two ends.

cnv.text: 這端一個基路伯，那端一個基路伯；他在施恩座的兩端做了兩個基路伯，和施恩座連在一起。

ccb.text: 这两个基路伯天使跟施恩座连在一起，
